## Checklist

- [ ] Exact question phrasing confirmed (not paraphrased)
- [ ] Word limits confirmed
- [ ] Theme classification applied (see CONTRIBUTING.md for valid themes)
- [ ] Seed file created at `seed/programs/[slug].sql`
- [ ] Tested locally: `compute_significance_scores()` and `compute_program_dna()` run without error after insert
